subject: ML — Supervised Learning
question: k-fold cross-validation:
options: Splits data into k folds, trains on k-1, tests on 1, rotates
explanation: Each fold serves as test set once. Average performance across k folds.

subject: ML — Supervised Learning
question: LOOCV (Leave-One-Out CV) has k =
explanation: LOOCV: each fold has 1 test point. k=n. Low bias but high variance and computational cost.

subject: ML — Supervised Learning
question: Stratified k-fold ensures:
options: Each fold has same class proportion as full dataset
explanation: Stratified: preserves class distribution. Important for imbalanced datasets.

subject: ML — Supervised Learning
question: Training/validation/test split purpose:
options: Train on train, tune on validation, evaluate on test
explanation: Train: fit model. Validation: tune hyperparameters. Test: final unbiased evaluation.
